heading: Art. 5. Territorial applicability of this chapter
label: 805 Art. 5. Territorial applicability of this chapter
text: This chapter applies in all places.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)80550:555.(Art. 5), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 110The word “applies” is substituted for the words “shall be applicable”.
